items.text: The component shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.0 and a step size of 0.1
items.fragment: The component shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.0 and a step size of 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: The component shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with an initial value of 0.0 and a step size of 0.1

items.text: The component shall define the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.fragment: The component shall define the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.requirement_fragment: The component shall define the constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0

items.text: The component shall invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable
items.fragment: The component shall invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable
items.requirement_fragment: The component shall invoke the kinematicLinearization function from the gcas_nodes library, passing t as a parameter, to compute the height variable

items.text: The component shall set the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7
items.fragment: The component shall set the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7
items.requirement_fragment: The component shall set the output port timeToRecovery to the constant 3.7

items.text: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds 3.7, the computed height shall always be greater than minHeightAllowed
items.fragment: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds 3.7, the computed height shall always be greater than minHeightAllowed
items.requirement_fragment: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds 3.7, the computed height shall always be greater than minHeightAllowed

items.text: When the simulation time t reaches or exceeds 3.7, the current height shall be greater than the previous height to indicate a pull-up trend
